inputs.file: sources/Professor Layton and the Miracle Mask US Any% Guide.pdf

anomalies: images: dataset omitted — the source snapshots contain no standalone image files, and the route PDF's embedded screenshots are predominantly puzzle solutions, excluded by the spoiler-free constraint (schema forbids an empty dataset). Approved by Pierre 2026-07-07.
puzzles: per-puzzle picarat values are not in any reachable source (the blogspot lists only cumulative progress; layton.fandom.com is HTTP-blocked) — the field is omitted rather than guessed.
ch3-a073: "Briefing 1:" relies on an adjacent solution screenshot in the route PDF, not extracted (spoiler rule) — instruction incomplete as text.
ch3-a075: "Briefing 2:" — same screenshot dependency as ch3-a073.
ch3-a077: "Briefing 3:" — same screenshot dependency as ch3-a073.
ch5-a079: "Magic Square Puzzle:" relies on adjacent solution screenshots in the route PDF, not extracted (spoiler rule).
ch5-a080: "First Move" — same screenshot dependency as ch5-a079.
ch5-a081: "Second Move" — same screenshot dependency as ch5-a079.

notes: First run. Dataset set (chapters, route-actions, puzzles, mechanics; puzzles limited to the 82 on the any% route; images omitted) approved by Pierre 2026-07-07.

route-actions IDs are chapter + zero-padded sequence (e.g. ch1-a012) — a deviation from content-key minting approved at the category gate: route lines repeat verbatim constantly, and the source PDF is frozen, so sequence within chapter is deterministic across re-runs.
82 puzzles on the route, not the 70 first estimated — the early count missed puzzle lines at PDF page breaks (form feed broke the regex anchor).
prologue-a001..a003 (timer-start note, opening Cutscene and Mystery) precede the Prologue heading in the PDF; assigned to the prologue.
"IMPORTANT: TO TILT..." emulator note wraps across two PDF lines; merged into one record (ch6-a251).
No puzzle-solution content was extracted anywhere (Pierre's spoiler-free constraint): puzzle records carry the blogspot post URL as a pointer only; route puzzle lines are the bare number as printed.
mechanics facts quoted from the Nintendo e-manual with pdftotext letter-spacing artifacts normalized; wording otherwise preserved.
Blogspot puzzle names/URLs read from the Blogger posts feed (5 pages, snapshots in sources/pl5-walkthrough/).

Refresh re-run 2026-07-08 answering QA 79730d7 (stale sources.json digest after fb6da77): datasets re-verified, layers/data.json byte-identical (b140b5a46a2382226f95da31706fb1b8f2f221ad6cf7b299375fb1921aa656cc). The new src-pl5-hintcoins capture was read and deliberately NOT classified into a dataset — its location-name vocabulary already serves the spine via sourceRefs, and extracting its per-location hint-coin data would be a new category needing Pierre's sign-off (and would change data.json bytes, input-staling the approved spine).
